hero.description: Connect with verified domestic helpers, employers, and agents through our secure AI-powered platform. Every profile is verified with Fayda ID for your peace of mind.

trust.title: Your safety is our priority
trust.description: We verify every user with government-issued Fayda ID before they can connect with others on our platform.

identityVerified.title: Identity Verified
identityVerified.description: Every user goes through Fayda ID verification. Know exactly who you're working with.

communityTrusted.title: Community Trusted
communityTrusted.description: Read honest reviews from real employers and helpers. Make informed decisions.

secureContracts.title: Secure Contracts
secureContracts.description: Generate legally-binding contracts in English and Amharic. Protect both parties.

roleSelection.title: How would you like to join?
roleSelection.subtitle: Select your role to create a verified profile and start connecting with trusted people.

helper.title: I'm looking for work
helper.subtitle: Register as Helper
helper.description: Create your verified profile, showcase your skills, and connect with employers who value your work.

employer.title: I need household help
employer.subtitle: Register as Employer
employer.description: Find verified, trustworthy helpers matched to your needs. Post requirements and review candidates.

agent.title: I help connect others
agent.subtitle: Register as Agent
agent.description: Join as a Delala to help your community. Connect employers with helpers and earn referral rewards.

stats.title: Trusted by thousands across Ethiopia
stats.subtitle: Real numbers from real people using SmartHire AI

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in just a few simple steps and find trusted help or opportunities today.

step1.title: Create Your Profile
step1.description: Sign up and create your verified profile. Tell us about yourself, your skills, or what kind of help you need.

step2.title: Verify Your Identity
step2.description: Complete Fayda ID verification to build trust. This helps ensure everyone on our platform is who they say they are.

step3.title: Get Matched
step3.description: Our AI matches you with the best candidates based on your requirements, location, and preferences.

step4.title: Connect Safely
step4.description: Review profiles, read reviews, and connect with confidence. Generate secure contracts for peace of mind.

chatbot.title: SmartHire Assistant
chatbot.helpMessage: I can help you find trusted household help or employment opportunities. Please sign in to continue our conversation.
chatbot.privateMessage: Your conversation is private and secure

signIn.title: Welcome Back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to your SmartHire AI account

footer.description: Revolutionizing the hiring process through intelligent matching, automated screening, and seamless Fayda ID verification. Find your dream job or perfect candidate today.
